use_cases: Multi-select filtering in dashboards or search interfaces
Category or tag selection in content management systems
Filter options in e-commerce product browsers
Form input for selecting multiple preferences or interests
Quick-toggle selection for settings or configuration panels
ai_summary: A multi-select chip selector component with animated selection states and spring-based width transitions. Each chip smoothly animates its background color, border, and width when toggled, with a reveal animation for checkmark indicators. Designed for filtering, categorization, and preference selection interfaces with a clean, pill-shaped aesthetic.
